ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for Laura Briscese, Personal Representative.

Ms. Ebey reports that she is waiting for her client to sign the verification of the petition for final distribution and will file the petition thereafter.

The matter is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for and with Laura Briscese, Personal Representative.

Ms. Ebey advises that a scheduling oversight caused her failure to appear at the last calling of this matter and apologizes to the court accordingly. Ms. Ebey reports that the petition is being reviewed for signature and that previously pending tax issues had caused the delays. Ms. Ebey confirms that Mr. Applegate has reviewed the petition.

The Status hearing is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Amended Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Applegate, via Zoom, for Joseph Mickolowski, Interested party.

The court confirms with Mr. Applegate that his client is waiving the accounting and that Ms. Ebey has been provided him documents and believes that Ms. Ebey is ready to close this matter. Mr. Applegaate confirms that an amended Inventory and Appraisal has been filed and that he is comfortable with the current status of the estate. The court notes that neither Amanda Ebey nor her client Laura Briscese are present and will be issuing an order to appear accordingly.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Laura Briscese and Attorney Amanda L. Ebey to appear on Oct-17-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. The Status on Filing of Amended Inventory and Appraisal is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Amended Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Applegate, via Zoom, for Joseph Mickolowski, Interested party.

The court noted that neither Amanda Ebey nor her client Laura Briscese are present. The court confirms that Mr. Applegate's client is still considering waiving the accounting and that Ms. Ebey has been cooperative and has provided him documents but that he has been unable to review them. Mr. Applegate advises that he has not heard from Ms. Ebey regarding today's hearing. The court considers Mr. Applegate's report and advises that it will not be issuing an Order to Appear to Ms. Ebey or to her client for failure to appear at today's hearing accordingly.

The matter is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Amended Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for Laura Briscese, Personal Representative; Douglas Applegate, via Zoom, for Joseph Mickolowski, Interested Party.

Ms. Ebey reports of the filing of a supplemental inventory and appraisal ("I&A") and that an accounting had been prepared but she believes that Mr. Applegate's client may waive the accounting. The court reminds Ms. Ebey that the court needs date of death statements and not 1099's in the I&A. Ms. Ebey reports that she will do her best to obtain the statements as the accounts are all cash accounts. Me. Applegate confirms Ms. Ebey's statement regarding his client possibly waiving the accounting and reports that matter should be resolved within the next thirty (30) days.

The matters are continued to Aug-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Amended Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, via Zoom, for Laura Briscese, Administrator; Douglas Applegate, for Joseph Mickolowski, Interested Party.

Ms. Ebey reports that a Status Report is prepared but that an outstanding IRS issue needs to be addressed before filing and if a waiver of accounting is confirmed she plans to file a petition for final distribution. Ms. Ebey advises that she believes that Mr. Mickolowski is the sole heir and asks if Mr. Applegate is willing to waive accounting on behalf of his client. Mr. Applegate advises that he cannot waive the accounting but is willing to contact the heir to advise him regarding the waiver.

The matters are continued to Jul-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jul-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Amended Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Laura Briscese (administrator).

Ms. Ebey stated that she filed a corrected inventory and appraisal ("I & A") after the last hearing which she believes answers the probate examiner's questions, that she attached the TIAA tax statements to the I & A, that a courtesy copy was given to the examiner and that she wasn't really sure why she was here today. Ms. Ebey also stated that as soon as they hear from the accountant, they will be able to file for close of this state. The court explained that the recent I & A was filed with the 2019 1099's, that the date of death was in May of 2018, and that 2019 is of interest, but the target for the inventory and appraisal should be as of the date of death. Ms. Ebey stated that this is all her client was able to obtain, that this is the complete source of information that was available to her client which is reflected in the amounts and of what she was able to collect, and explained the circumstances surrounding Mr. Hauser's death. Ms. Ebey also stated that the public guardian got involved in search for family members, spoke of how her client came into the case, stated that the apartment was scoured with the public guardian, that she (Ms. Ebey) went through the apartment herself and that they also had a private cleaning company. In addition, Ms. Ebey stated that no other documents were located, that her client has provided all of the information she had access to at the apartment and that this is the best they can provide. Discussion was held with regard to Ms. Ebey going directly to TIAA to see if they can provide earlier statements. Ms. Ebey stated that she does not know if Mr. Mickolowski will waive an accounting, that she has reached out to Mr. Applegate several times, but has not heard back yet, that the plan is to get final approval from the accountant and to ask Mr. Mickolowski to allow them to close this estate, and that she can do a status report, but she needs to hear from Mr. Applegate and the accountant. Status on filing of the amended inventory and appraisal, and status on close of estate are continued to May 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Ms. Ebey is unable to file a petition for fnial distribution by then, she needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Dec-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Petitioner.

Ms. Ebey stated that she did her own search on ancestry.com, that the Public Administrator did research, that her Client did research and that they could not find any heirs on the maternal side. Ms. Ebey also stated that she received a call from Attorney Doug Applegate who was contacted by an heir search and that they think they found a first cousin of the Decedent. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $490,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for September 21, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Ebey that she will need to file a petition to determine entitlement before final distribution.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
